description.value:
Frequency once per day

Beyond emulating dragonkin's energy breath, you've now learned to channel the power of a true dragon, able to spew forth its potent energy. Choose a type of damage that corresponds to a specific dragon. You can exhale this energy as a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] or @Template[type:line|distance:30] that deals @Damage[14d6[untyped]|options:area-damage] damage plus 4d6 persistent damage of the chosen type (basic Reflex save using the higher of your class DC or spell DC). On a critical failure, a target also becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Frightened]{Frightened 2}.
